CreateAppBlbIpGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters
CreateAppBlbIpGroup.name: Name of the IP group. 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, -, /, ., _. Auto-generated if omitted
CreateAppBlbIpGroup.desc: Description of the IP group, max 200 characters
CreateAppBlbIpGroup.memberList: List of IP members attached to the IP group
